candidates.why: This is an explicit operating D&A row above financial items, but it appears below Gross profit and alongside operating expense lines rather than within or beneath the selected COGS row 'Cost of goods sold'. That placement suggests it is not a separate COGS-specific D&A add-back relative to the selected COGS bucket.

This is an explicit operating D&A row above financial items, but it is shown below Gross profit and not as a sub-line of 'Cost of goods sold'. It therefore does not clearly belong as a separate add-back to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.row_label: Operating expenses excluding depreciation and amortisation
candidates.why: This is not itself a D&A row; it indicates that operating expenses are presented excluding D&A, which supports treating the separate D&A rows as outside SG&A-type operating expenses rather than within COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible D&A rows are presented after Gross profit, so they do not appear to be separate add-ons to the selected COGS row.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A row above financial items. Because the selected XSGA bucket includes 'Operating expenses excluding depreciation and amortisation', this depreciation line appears to sit outside that selected bucket and should be added separately later.

Explicit operating D&A row above financial items. The wording of the selected XSGA parent row says operating expenses are excluding D&A, so this amortization line appears separate from the selected XSGA bucket and should be added separately later.

candidates.row_label: Operating expenses excluding depreciation and amortisation
candidates.why: This selected XSGA row explicitly excludes D&A, which is strong evidence that the separate depreciation and amortization rows should be added outside the selected XSGA bucket rather than treated as already embedded.

variables.notes: The statement explicitly presents operating expenses excluding depreciation and amortisation, and then shows separate depreciation and amortization rows above operating profit. Therefore these D&A rows should be added separately relative to the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket. No SG&A-specific D&A summary row is provided, so both explicit rows are selected.
